creator: yuripv@yuripv.net
text:
Pretty much standard -CURRENT instance with empty /etc/src.conf:

loki:yuri:~$ uname -a
FreeBSD loki.xvoid.org 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #2 r326495+a119d8a33204(master): Sun Dec  3 09:45:28 MSK 2017     yuri@loki.xvoid.org:/usr/obj/data/src/freebsd/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64
loki:yuri:~$ file `which man`
/usr/bin/man: POSIX shell script, ASCII text executable
